name: Claude (bundled)
description: Claude as a provider plugin (Fase 4). Runs the real interactive Claude TUI in a pane (TTY) and, headless, drives it over stream-json (SDK) with the cockpit's permission prompts, live model/permission/effort switching, and usage limits. Bundled and pre-approved: out of the box nothing changes. Requires the claude CLI installed and logged in on the machine running Cockpit.
author: Cockpit
